# FoveatedStreamingSession.Status.initialized

**Case**

The initial state of the session.

## Declaration

```swift
case initialized
```

## Discussion

This state indicates that the session isn’t connected to a streaming endpoint.
title: FoveatedStreamingSession.Status.initialized
